creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
On Oct 21, 2008, at 1:30 AM, Stefan Walter wrote:

> Hi Joseph,
>
> please note that a problem report (ports/127302 [1]) for a port you're
> maintaining, security/swatch, has been around for a while. Can you  
> have a
> look at it and send a followup with a comment on it so we know what  
> the
> state of this is?


At this point I haven't used swatch in a number of years and won't  
likely be able to look at this in the near term.  If there was a  
specific update in the past that caused this problem feel free to  
revert it.

--
Joseph Scott
